text:
There once was a quiet village by the sea. Every day the same thing would happen. A seagull would soar high into the sky. Every evening it would come soaring back. You’d think it had a favorite spot. It didn’t. Tonight the gull flew higher than ever.

You couldn’t hear anything. Not even its call. You’d think it fell asleep. That’s when you saw it. On the ground. Owling wildly.

It lived there.

An owl. That’s surprising enough. How would you feel?

There sat the owl. Everything hurt.

You took pity on it? You flew it down?

Just flew away.

That owl spent a fortnight cuddling a man.

All this time.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
